steps: Check your collection schedule on the city's Sanitation Schedules map to confirm your pickup day.
Call Public Works at (334) 625-2180 to report the missed pickup — have your address ready.
If not resolved within 48 hours, submit a 311 service request online for formal tracking.
trash_pickup.safetyNote: No active alerts in your area.
trash_pickup.conciergeNote: Hope this helps — missed pickups are usually resolved within a day or two once reported.
trash_pickup.reportBody:
Dear Public Works — Sanitation Department,

I am writing to report a missed trash pickup at my address. My scheduled collection day has passed and the trash has not been collected.

Please arrange for pickup at your earliest convenience.

Thank you for your assistance.

steps: Note the exact location (street name, nearest intersection, or address) and approximate size of the pothole.
Call Public Works at (334) 625-2180 or submit a 311 service request online with the location details.
If the pothole poses an immediate safety hazard (large, in a busy intersection), mention this when reporting for priority handling.
pothole.safetyNote: No active alerts in your area.
pothole.conciergeNote: Thanks for helping keep Montgomery's roads safe. Pothole repairs are typically addressed within 5-10 business days.
pothole.reportBody:
Dear Public Works Department,

I would like to report a pothole that needs repair. The pothole is located on [street name] near [nearest intersection].

The condition may pose a safety risk to drivers and pedestrians. Please schedule repair at your earliest convenience.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

steps: Visit the Finance Department — Revenue Division at City Hall or call (334) 625-2059 for application requirements.
Prepare required documents: business name registration, state tax ID, federal EIN, and proof of location.
Submit your application in person or check the city website for online options. Processing typically takes 3-5 business days.
business_license.contactExtra: View active business licenses at opendata.montgomeryal.gov
business_license.safetyNote: No active alerts in your area.
business_license.conciergeNote: Good luck with your business venture! The Revenue Division staff are helpful with first-time applications.
business_license.reportBody:
Dear Finance Department — Revenue Division,

I am writing to inquire about obtaining a business license in the City of Montgomery. I would like to understand the application process, required documentation, and associated fees.

Please advise on next steps or direct me to the appropriate resources.

Thank you for your time.

steps: Check the Montgomery EMA tornado shelter map for the nearest designated shelter to your location.
Sign up for CodeRED emergency alerts at montgomeryal.gov to receive severe weather notifications.
Keep an emergency kit ready and review your family's severe weather plan before storm season.
tornado_shelter.safetyNote: Severe weather season is active. Stay weather-aware and know your nearest shelter.
tornado_shelter.reportBody:
Dear Emergency Management Agency,

I am writing to request information about the nearest tornado shelter to my location. I would also like to know about shelter accessibility and hours of operation during severe weather events.

Thank you for helping keep our community safe.
